titleStmt.title: SII 18.444: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 444. (B.K. No. 131 of 1932-33.) KAṆAVAḶḶI, HAVERI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Stone built into the front wall of the temple of Nīlakaṇṭhēśvara.

summary.p: This inscription dated in Śaka 1638, Durmukhi, Mārgaśira śu. 6, Sunday, registers a grant of land made by Bahadūra Hānumanta-gauḍa, the Dēśāyi of Guttaḷa, at the time of the car-festival of Mailāraliṅga. The grant was made for the merit of the donor's forefathers. The details of the given date correspond to A.D. 1716, November 9, Friday (not Sunday as stated in the record).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī svasti śrījeyabhyudaya nrupaśālivā
hanaśakavaruśya 1638 neya durmikhinā
masaṁ . rada mārgasira śu 6 bhānuvārada
lu śrīmayilāraliṁgana rathōcsa kalada
llu guttaḷada dēśayi bāhadūra hanumaṁ
tagauḍaru . nīlakaṁṭha yōgīśvaraiyage
taṁmā pitrugaḷige Akṣayapu(ṁ)ṇya
lōka Āgaleṁdu kaṁnavaḷi gramadali
kerehiṁde dēsagatti gadde paṭiyoḷage
kuḷa ga 6 Āru varahada bhūminu dhāra
pūrvakadalli koṭṭuyidēne
yī tōṭa manige paṭi pramaṇavila
yidake tapidaru muśallamanaradara haṁ
di Āṇe brāṁmmarādare kapile gō
harttamaḍidaṇe siva bhaktaru tapida
re vibhuti rudrākṣe tappida hage viṣṇu
ge rāmānuja Āṇe Uḷadādavaru
tapidaru Avara bāyali katte
ṇi kallupa
nīlakaṭayagīśvaraĀyana
Digital edition of SII 18.444 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
